tasks.title: Room v15→v16 paired_bridges table + DAO + three-way splash + Settings → Mode reentry (S8-07, S8-10)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-200..204) implement WelcomeSplashScreen.kt with the 3 tiles + Settings → Mode reentry path. Persist app.mode in DataStore. (REQ-214/215) Room migration v15→v16 adds paired_bridges table per REQ-213 schema. Single migration per Article XIII. DAOs JVM-testable per Article VI.

tasks.title: PairScannerScreen + ECDH/CSR/HMAC pair-claim + Keystore storage (S8-08, S8-09)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature} AND meshsat/spec/001-pair-protocol/ for protocol details. SECOND: (REQ-205) PairScannerScreen.kt with CameraX + ZXing. (REQ-206) verify QR's Ed25519 sig with "BC" provider per Article III. (REQ-207/208) X25519 + Ed25519 keypair generation + CSR + HKDF-SHA256. (REQ-209/210) TLS 1.3 with OkHttp CertificatePinner against QR.fp; abort on mismatch. (REQ-211) POST /api/v2/pair/claim with HMAC-SHA256(ss, ...). (REQ-212) on 200, store cert+JWT in Android Keystore via PairedClientKeystore.kt + EncryptedSharedPreferences for JWT. (REQ-224) NEVER persist raw private key bytes outside the Keystore. Tests cover happy path + SPKI mismatch + sig invalid.

tasks.title: Hybrid Compose+WebView shell + Source switcher + per-source notifications + remove-pairing flow (S8-11, S8-12)
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature}. SECOND: (REQ-216) implement HybridShell.kt orchestrating native vs WebView routing per the table in design.md. (REQ-217/218/226) WebView client uses OkHttp interceptor for Authorization Bearer + TLS SPKI verification; on mismatch reject with explicit error AND NO load. Per Article XIV, Compose state via rememberSaveable. (REQ-219/220/221) SourceSwitcher.kt as Material 3 top-drawer + Pinia-equivalent state pattern (Kotlin shared store). Per-source data scope reload within 2s. (REQ-222/223) tagged notifications per spec/009 REQ-803 + nav on tap. (REQ-225) removePairedBridge() wipes Keystore alias + paired_bridges row + paired_bridge_* rows.
